emails.subject: Park-n-ride and Deal Profitability
emails.body: Park-n-ride and Deal Profitability Michelle is it possible to evaluate a park-n-ride in deal profitability? If not would this be valuable? If it would be Mei-Ling and I would like to meet with you to understand what we might have to modify.
